---
title: "Zeckendorf Folds, Sturmian Rigidity, and Parry Divergence on the Golden-Mean Shift"
subtitle: "Ergodic theory and symbolic dynamics"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, ergodic, submitted]
target-journal: "Ergodic Theory and Dynamical Systems"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram"
theorems: 46
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_podcast.wav"
description: "The canonical Zeckendorf fold on the Sturmian slice is bijective and realizes the higher-block presentation, giving an exact KL formula and sharp support-constrained Renyi minima in closed form...."
---

## Abstract

The canonical Zeckendorf fold on the Sturmian slice is bijective and realizes the higher-block presentation, giving an exact KL formula and sharp support-constrained Renyi minima in closed form.

**Keywords:** Sturmian subshifts, Zeckendorf numeration, golden-mean shift, Parry measure, Renyi divergence

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 46 |
| Target journal | Ergodic Theory and Dynamical Systems |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Ergodic theory and symbolic dynamics |

## Infographic

![folded_rotation_histogram Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_slides.pdf)
- [Podcast (WAV)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_podcast.wav)
- [Video (MP4)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/folded-rotation-histogram/releases/download/media-v1/folded_rotation_histogram_video.mp4)

## Links

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](../../papers/folded-rotation-histogram/)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
